details: The agent ran commands against the cluster (kubectl-axi deploy, deploy view, pods, pods view) and correctly identified both required elements: (1) the rollout is stuck with ProgressDeadlineExceeded/Progressing=False, and (2) the root cause is the non-existent image nginx:2.0-does-not-exist causing ImagePullBackOff on the new v2 pod, while old v1 pods continue serving traffic.
